text_block_list.text:
I show Seiun Sky the letter and present that one
of her fans handed to me yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa, guess this means I've finally become
famous.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what the present is. Let's have a
look-see.

She removes the wrapping, revealing a small desk
clock with an alarm function.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer... is this really from a fan?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Seiun Sky, I love you and your
unpredictable races!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"I saw you taking a nap the other day, but when I
called out to you, you kept sleeping."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Feel free to use this clock so you can wake up
right on time!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
These fans are really watching me every which
way I go.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna have to find a better place to chill out
when I skip practice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heeey, relax! You know I'm kidding.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now, time to find the perfect place to put this
clock.

The next day, Seiun Sky actually shows up at the
academy with time to spare.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That alarm clock's intense. I'm no light sleeper,
and that thing woke me right up.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Course... "A tool is nothing if you don't use it," is
the ol' family motto.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sure does! It's like the phrase, "When life gives
you lemons, make lemonade."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The clock is the lemon, and I'm making
lemonade. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, waking up early is nice every once in a
while.

With her circadian rhythm sorted out, Seiun Sky's
spirits are unusually high.
